ground_truth.title: Top 50 Analytics firms in the United States (2025)
ground_truth.main_content: This directory lists the top Analytics & Business Intelligence firms in the United States for 2025. All firms are vetted for competence, ability to produce results, reliability, trustworthiness, and long-term potential. Analytics & Business Intelligence (A&BI) firms provide data-driven insights and decision support to businesses using data and analytical tools to help companies understand and improve their business performance. The listed firms include: Boolean Solutions (Delhi, India, 2018, 11-50 employees) - offering creative designs for web & mobile applications; Symbyte (Cape Town, South Africa, 2020, 11-25 employees) - a data consultancy helping turn data into revenue using AI and predictive analytics; Alphametic (Miami, Florida, 2015, 11-25 employees) - an AI-forward digital marketing agency; Domo (American Fork, Utah, 2010, 500+ employees) - a cloud-based business intelligence platform; DataRobot (Boston, Massachusetts, 2012, 500+ employees) - an enterprise AI platform for machine learning; TIBCO (Fort Lauderdale, Florida, 1997, 500+ employees) - providing data integration and analytics solutions; SAS (Cary, North Carolina, 1976, 10,001 employees) - a global leader in analytics with AI and machine learning; Mode (San Francisco, California, 2013, 51-200 employees) - a collaborative data analysis platform; Numerator (Chicago, Illinois, 1990, 1,001-5,000 employees) - providing consumer insights; LatentView Analytics (Chennai, India, 2006, 1,001-5,000 employees) - a data analytics consulting firm; Altair (Troy, Michigan, 1985, 1,001-5,000 employees) - specializing in computational intelligence and simulation; Palantir (Denver, Colorado, 2003, 1,001-5,000 employees) - specializing in big data analytics for complex environments.
with: Boolean Solutions offer creative designs to build applications that are intuitive and offer a great user experience, including web & mobile applications, designs, and consulting.
Symbyte is a data consultancy that helps you turn data into revenue using AI and predictive analytics.
Alphametic is an AI-forward digital marketing agency in Miami that helps businesses drive leads and customers with SEO, digital ads, and performance-driven content.
Domo is a cloud-based business intelligence platform that empowers organizations to visualize and analyze data in real-time, facilitating informed decision-making and collaboration across teams.
Palantir specializes in big data analytics, offering advanced software platforms that help organizations integrate, manage, and analyze large datasets to drive informed decision-making.
without: Each engineer brings a unique approach to development. They're all efficient and fluent in several methodologies.
They've honestly been fantastic. I have been delighted with their work.
Domo's data visualization tools helped us make sense of our metrics and improved our decision-making process.
DataRobot's AI solutions transformed our data analysis, making it easier to understand and act on our insights.
TIBCO's analytics tools helped us make better decisions, leading to a noticeable improvement in our operations.
